meta.analysis_focus: Style, design language, color logic, typography, layout, graphic placement, message delivery

overall_design_language.style: Co-branded partnership ad with a split-layout structure. Clean, product-forward, lifestyle-adjacent design. Playful and youthful energy driven by the guest brand's identity.
overall_design_language.visual_hierarchy: Top text → Product image (hero) → Partner logo (bottom-left of image zone) → Swiggy branding strip (bottom)

color_logic.primary_background_top_section: Sky blue / light cyan (#87CEEB range) — used as photo backdrop inside the image zone
color_logic.primary_background_bottom_section: Pure white — used for the Swiggy CTA strip
color_logic.color_purpose: Blue backdrop evokes freshness and coolness (ice cream context). White strip creates a clean break and signals platform/brand credibility. Orange Swiggy color anchors the delivery platform identity.

typography.headline_font_style: Bold, heavy sans-serif — large point size, left-aligned
typography.sub_headline_font_style: Regular weight sans-serif, smaller — inline with headline block
typography.font_hierarchy: Headline dominates top-left, sub-text sits below in lighter weight

text_placement.headline: Top-left of the ad, occupying roughly top 20% of the image zone
text_placement.sub_text: Directly below headline, same left-aligned column
text_placement.swiggy_tagline: Inside bottom white strip, right of logo
text_placement.legal_text: Bottom-left corner in very small type

graphic_and_image_placement.hero_image: Center-to-right of the image zone — multiple stacked ice cream tubs arranged in a pyramid/cluster formation, photographed on a misty white surface
graphic_and_image_placement.guest_brand_logo: Lower-left corner of the image zone, overlaid on the product photo
graphic_and_image_placement.swiggy_logo: Center of the bottom white strip
